title: Appointment Notification of Insurance Advisory committee Members

नई कदलली, सोमिार, मई **9, 2022** /िैिाख **19, 1944** हैदराबाद , [जिज्ञापन III /4/असा./64/2022-23] 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC.4] # **INSURANCE REGULATORY AND DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY OF INDIA** # **NOTIFICATION** Hyderabad, the 4th May, 2022 # **INSURANCE ADVISORY COMMITTEE** **F. No. IRDAI/IAC/2/181/2022** - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 25 of the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 1999 (41 of 1999), and in terms of Regulation 3A of the Insurance Advisory Committee (Meetings) Regulations, 2000, the Authority hereby makes the following notification: 1. Mr. Prakash Kumar, former Chief Executive Officer, GST Network, is appointed as Member of the Insurance Advisory Committee from the date of notification, and 2. Mr. Venkat Changavalli, Management Consultant is appointed as Member of the Insurance Advisory Committee from the date of notification in place of Insurance Ombudsman, Guwahati, who was one of the member of the Insurance Advisory Committee reconstituted vide Notification F. No. IRDAI/IAC/7/179/2021 dated 5th August, 2021. DEBASISH PANDA, Chairperson [ADVT.-III/4/Exty./64/2022-23] Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. L.-33004/99 सी.जी.-ए.पी.-अ.-09052022-235650 **xxxGIDHxxx CG-AP-E-09052022-235650 xxxGIDExxx** असाधारण **EXTRAORDINARY** भाग **III** — खण ड **4 PART III—Section 4** पाजधकार स पकाजित **PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY** सं. **245] No. 245]** नई कदलली, सोमिार, मई **9, 2022** /िैिाख **19, 1944 NEW DELHI, MONDAY, MAY 9, 2022/VAISAKHA 19, 1944** भारतीय बीमा जिजनयामक और जिकास पाजधकरण अजधसूचना हैदराबाद , 4 मई, 2022 # बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत फा. सं. भा.बी.जि.जि.पा./आईएसी/2/181/2022.— बीमा जिजनयामक और जिकास प्राजधकरण अजधजनयम , 1999 (1999 का 41) के धारा 25 के उप-धारा (1) द्वारा प्रदत्त िजियों प्रयोग करते हुए तथा बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत (बैठकें) जिजनयम, 2000, के जिजनयम 3अ के अनुसार प्राजधकरण जनम्नजलजखत अजधसूचना िारी करता है : **1.** श्री प्रकाि कुमार , पूिव मुख्य कायवकारी अजधकारी , िीएसटी नेटिकव को अजधसूचना की तारीख से बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत का सदस्ट्य जनयुि ककया िाता है , और **2.** श्री िेंकट चंगािजलल , प्रबंधन सलाहकार को बीमा लोकपाल , गुिाहाटी के स्ट्थान पर बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत में सदस्ट्य के रूप में अजधसूचना की तारीख से जनयुि ककया िाता है , िो फा. सं. भा.बी.जि.जि.प्रा./ बी.स.स./7/179/2021 कदनांक 5 अगस्ट्त , 2021 के अनुसार पुनगवठठत बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत के एक सदस्ट्य थे । देबािीष पण्डा , अध्यक्ष [जिज्ञापन III /4/असा./64/2022-23] 3142 GI/2022 (1) 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC.4] # **INSURANCE REGULATORY AND DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY OF INDIA** # **NOTIFICATION** Hyderabad, the 4th May, 2022 # **INSURANCE ADVISORY COMMITTEE** **F. No. IRDAI/IAC/2/181/2022** - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 25 of the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 1999 (41 of 1999), and in terms of Regulation 3A of the Insurance Advisory Committee (Meetings) Regulations, 2000, the Authority hereby makes the following notification: 1. Mr. Prakash Kumar, former Chief Executive Officer, GST Network, is appointed as Member of the Insurance Advisory Committee from the date of notification, and 2. Mr. Venkat Changavalli, Management Consultant is appointed as Member of the Insurance Advisory Committee from the date of notification in place of Insurance Ombudsman, Guwahati, who was one of the member of the Insurance Advisory Committee reconstituted vide Notification F. No. IRDAI/IAC/7/179/2021 dated 5th August, 2021. DEBASISH PANDA, Chairperson [ADVT.-III/4/Exty./64/2022-23] Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. chunks.heading: **NOTIFICATION**
chunks.attachment: बीमा सलाहकार समिति के सदस्यों की नियुक्ति अधिसूचना _ Appointment Notification of Insurance Advisory committee Members.pdf

chunks.heading: **INSURANCE ADVISORY COMMITTEE**
chunks.attachment: बीमा सलाहकार समिति के सदस्यों की नियुक्ति अधिसूचना _ Appointment Notification of Insurance Advisory committee Members.pdf
chunks.content:
**F. No. IRDAI/IAC/2/181/2022** - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 25 of the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 1999 (41 of 1999), and in terms of Regulation 3A of the Insurance Advisory Committee (Meetings) Regulations, 2000, the Authority hereby makes the following notification: 

1. Mr. Prakash Kumar, former Chief Executive Officer, GST Network, is appointed as Member of the Insurance Advisory Committee from the date of notification, and 

2. Mr. Venkat Changavalli, Management Consultant is appointed as Member of the Insurance Advisory Committee from the date of notification in place of Insurance Ombudsman, Guwahati, who was one of the member of the Insurance Advisory Committee reconstituted vide Notification F. No. IRDAI/IAC/7/179/2021 dated 5<sup>th</sup> August, 2021. 

DEBASISH PANDA, Chairperson 

[ADVT.-III/4/Exty./64/2022-23]

chunks.heading: बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत
chunks.content:
फा. सं. भा.बी.जि.जि.पा./आईएसी/2/181/2022.— बीमा जिजनयामक और जिकास प्राजधकरण अजधजनयम , 1999 (1999 का 41) के धारा 25 के उप-धारा (1) द्वारा प्रदत्त िजियों प्रयोग करते हुए तथा बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत (बैठकें) जिजनयम, 2000, के जिजनयम 3अ के अनुसार प्राजधकरण जनम्नजलजखत अजधसूचना िारी करता है : 

**1.** श्री प्रकाि कुमार , पूिव मुख्य कायवकारी अजधकारी , िीएसटी नेटिकव को अजधसूचना की तारीख से बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत का सदस्ट्य जनयुि ककया िाता है , और 

**2.** श्री िेंकट चंगािजलल , प्रबंधन सलाहकार को बीमा लोकपाल , गुिाहाटी के स्ट्थान पर बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत में सदस्ट्य के रूप में अजधसूचना की तारीख से जनयुि ककया िाता है , िो फा. सं. भा.बी.जि.जि.प्रा./ बी.स.स./7/179/2021 कदनांक 5 अगस्ट्त , 2021 के अनुसार पुनगवठठत बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत के एक सदस्ट्य थे । 

देबािीष पण्डा , अध्यक्ष [जिज्ञापन III /4/असा./64/2022-23] 

3142 GI/2022 

(1) 

<u>2</u> 

THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY 

<u>[PART III—SEC.4]</u>

chunks.heading: **INSURANCE ADVISORY COMMITTEE**
chunks.content:
**F. No. IRDAI/IAC/2/181/2022** - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 25 of the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 1999 (41 of 1999), and in terms of Regulation 3A of the Insurance Advisory Committee (Meetings) Regulations, 2000, the Authority hereby makes the following notification: 

1. Mr. Prakash Kumar, former Chief Executive Officer, GST Network, is appointed as Member of the Insurance Advisory Committee from the date of notification, and 

2. Mr. Venkat Changavalli, Management Consultant is appointed as Member of the Insurance Advisory Committee from the date of notification in place of Insurance Ombudsman, Guwahati, who was one of the member of the Insurance Advisory Committee reconstituted vide Notification F. No. IRDAI/IAC/7/179/2021 dated 5<sup>th</sup> August, 2021. 

DEBASISH PANDA, Chairperson 

[ADVT.-III/4/Exty./64/2022-23]
